description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a gable roof covered in dark gray shingles. The front features a covered porch with a low wall and columns, providing a sheltered entryway. The exterior walls are painted a light gray, and the front door is wooden with a small window beside it. The side yard is landscaped with a variety of shrubs and a medium-sized deciduous tree, adding greenery and shade. Windows are present on the front and side, with an asymmetrical arrangement. The rear of the bungalow is plain, with a single back door and minimal fenestration.
description: A single-story gray bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and landscaped side yard with shrubs and a tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and part of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long wall, multiple shrubs, and a prominent tree in the yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with a single back door and the tree visible to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building, porch opening, and minimal window presence.
